ancestries.name: Dwarf
ancestries.description: Strong and hearty mountain-dwellers, foremost authorities of mining and engineering.

traits.name: Protection from Magic
traits.description: +2 bonus to Fortitude saving throw, +1 bonus to Will saving throw.

traits.name: Magic Disruption
traits.description: Natural defense against magic items (not weapons, armor, shields, gauntlets, girdles). Roll d%: 1-80 works, 81-100 disrupted. Cannot learn arcane spellcasting unless ancestral trait suppressed. Divine spells unaffected.

traits.name: Ancestral Enemies
traits.description: +1 to attack rolls against orcs, half-orcs, goblins, and hobgoblins.

traits.name: Giant Guard
traits.description: +4 temporary AC bonus against all attacks from Large or bigger creatures.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.description: Can discern features of slope or worked stone within 20 feet with a Wisdom/Perception check.

proficiencies.ancestral: Minor proficiency in either Engineering or Mining.
proficiencies.weaponry_optional: Proficiency in either hammers or picks (one and two-handed versions).

ancestries.weapons_armor: Any allowed by class. Tend not to use bows or elven armor.

restricted_classes.wizard: Cannot learn arcane spellcasting due to Magic Disruption (unless trait suppressed).

ancestries.name: Elf
ancestries.description: Deeply historic protectors of the world's natural beauty, patient and long-lived.

traits.name: Superior Focus
traits.description: +1 bonus on checks to notice secret or concealed objects.

traits.name: Danger Sense
traits.description: +2 bonus on any roll to avoid being surprised or caught flat-footed.

traits.name: Strength of Mind
traits.description: Immune to magical sleep effects. +2 Will saving throw vs mind-affecting spells (illusions, charms). Stacks with Wisdom bonus. Requires only 8 hours rest every two days.

traits.name: Improved Initiative
traits.description: Base initiative die reduced by one step (d12→d10, d8→d6, d4→d3, etc.).

proficiencies.weaponry_optional: Free weapon proficiency in one of: longsword, elven thin blade, short sword, rapier, or bow.

ancestries.weapons_armor: Any allowed by class. Tend not to use axes or heavy armor.

ancestries.name: Gnome
ancestries.description: Enterprising small humanoids, amazing engineers and born illusionists.

traits.name: Protection from Magic
traits.description: +1 bonus to all saving throws.

traits.name: Magic Disruption
traits.description: Similar to dwarves but does not disrupt illusion items or items made for gnomes/gnome's class. Cannot cast arcane spells except illusions. Divine spells unaffected.

traits.name: Ancestral Enemies
traits.description: +1 bonus to attack rolls against kobolds and goblins.

traits.name: Defensive Training
traits.description: +4 temporary AC bonus when fighting gnolls, bugbears, trolls, ogres, and giants.

traits.name: Underground Survival
traits.description: Can discern features of natural passages/caverns within 20 feet with Wisdom/Perception check.

traits.name: Illusions
traits.description: Once per day, may cast one of: ventriloquism, minor cantrip (temporary effect), phantasmal image (no larger than Tiny). Caster level = character level.

proficiencies.ancestral: Minor proficiency in Gemcutting and Engineering.
proficiencies.weaponry_optional: Proficient with shortspear. Double damage when set for charge.

ancestries.weapons_armor: Any allowed by class. Weapons one size smaller, one less damage die category.
ancestries.size_note: Small. Weapons deal one less dice category in damage (e.g., 1d6 becomes 1d4).

restricted_classes.wizard: May only be a specialist illusionist. Only gnomes may multi-class with illusionist.

ancestries.name: Half-Elf
ancestries.description: Offspring of elves and humans, ambitious and eager to belong.
ancestries.conditional_languages: Speak elven if raised in elven culture.

traits.name: Enhanced Focus
traits.description: +1 bonus on checks to notice secret or concealed objects.

traits.name: Elven Strength of Mind
traits.description: 50% magic resistance against magical sleep effects. +1 Will saving throw vs mind-affecting spells (illusions, charms). Stacks with Wisdom bonus.

traits.name: Ambitious Start
traits.description: One additional proficiency slot at character creation (nonweapon or weapon).

proficiencies.weaponry_optional: Free proficiency in longsword, elven thin blade, rapier, or any bow.

ancestries.name: Half-Orc
ancestries.description: Born from the union of orc and human, hardened survivalists with a frightening temper.

traits.name: Frenzy
traits.description: Once per day, up to 10 rounds. -2 AC, +2 attack and damage. Fight until -10 HP (then die immediately). Enter as secondary action, exit early costs full round.

proficiencies.ancestral: Minor proficiency in either Wilderness Survival or Mountaineering.
proficiencies.weaponry_optional: Proficient in any one axe and unarmed attacks.

class_notes.paladin: Gnomes and half-orcs often fail to qualify. Only lawful half-orcs may petition.

ancestries.name: Halfling
ancestries.description: Peaceful, cheerful small folk who are supremely lucky.

traits.name: Protection from Magic
traits.description: +2 bonus to Will saving throw.

traits.name: Poison Resistance
traits.description: +2 bonus on Fortitude saves against natural poisons.

traits.name: Uncanny Luck
traits.description: One re-roll per day per four levels of experience. Can re-roll own roll or force GM to re-roll.

proficiencies.weaponry_optional: Free proficiency in slings and one of: javelins, throwing dagger, throwing axe, or spear. +1 attack and damage with slings.

ancestries.weapons_armor: Any allowed by class. Weapons one size smaller, one less damage die category.
ancestries.size_note: Small. Weapons deal one less dice category in damage.

ancestries.name: Human
ancestries.description: Ambitious, adaptable, and quick to act. The most common ancestry in most settings.
